name: rf2-docs-cljs-playground
description: re-frame2 docs/cljs live-CLJS-cell playground (rf2-y99zt Phase 1; rf2-j06sy Phase 1b cutover; rf2-bujlr Phase 2; rf2-00zvt Phase 3): CM6 + @nextjournal/clojure-mode + Scittle (plain + stock reagent/re-frame cells) + a self-contained re-frame2 SCI bundle (sci/, shadow-cljs) for live re-frame2 (v2) cells. esbuild IIFE bundle -> docs/cljs/playground.js + shadow-cljs -> docs/cljs/playground-rf2.js, instant-nav-safe extra_javascript bootstrap. Replaced Klipse as of Phase 1b.

scripts.build: npm run build:bootstrap && npm run build:rf2
scripts.build:rf2: cd sci && npm install && npm run build
